title: rubus × hirtocaulis
intro: Rubus × hirtocaulis is a hybrid plant species of the Rubus genus, commonly known as the Himalayan raspberry or Himalayan black raspberry. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Rubus × hirtocaulis include its ability to support cardiovascular health, boost the immune system, and exhibit antioxidant properties, making it a potential natural remedy for various ailments. Rubus × hirtocaulis is often used in herbal preparations, such as teas, tinctures, and jams, to harness its medicinal and nutritional benefits.
